title: PDF Merger
description: A completely free tool that allows you to merge multiple PDF files into a single file. All processing is done in your browser, ensuring privacy and security.

dropzone.hint: Select one or more PDF files

fileList.title: Files
fileList.editHint: Use List for file reordering, and Details for page reordering and rotation.

errors.selectPdf: Please select at least one PDF file.
errors.mergeError: An error occurred while merging PDFs.
errors.fileNameTooLong: File name must be less than {max} characters.
errors.notPdf: This is not a PDF file.
errors.totalPagesExceeded: Total page count exceeds the limit ({max} pages).
errors.fileReadError: Failed to read the file. Please re-select it.

warnings.nearSizeLimit: Total size exceeds 45MB. Files cannot be added once it exceeds 50MB.
warnings.formFieldsLost: Form fields and bookmarks are not preserved during merging.

about.title: About This App
about.description1: A free PDF merging tool that runs entirely in your browser.
about.description2: No server communication is required, all processing is done locally on your device.

privacy.title: Files and Privacy
privacy.description1: Uploaded PDFs are only stored in your device's memory or browser's temporary storage and are never sent externally.
privacy.description2: You can minimize traces by clearing the cache after use or using incognito mode.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.description1: We make no guarantees regarding the operation or accuracy and safety of the merged results.
disclaimer.description2: Please use at your own risk. Always backup important files before trying.

damages.title: Regarding Damages
damages.description: The author is not liable for any losses or damages (including data loss and lost profits) arising from the use or inability to use this application.

updates.title: Updates and Termination
updates.description: Features may be added, modified, or discontinued without notice. Please check the GitHub repository or public page for the latest information.

pdfToImage.title: PDF to Image Converter
pdfToImage.description: Convert each page of a PDF file to images (PNG/JPEG/WebP) and download them all as a ZIP file. All processing is done in your browser, ensuring privacy and security.

errors.convertError: An error occurred while converting the PDF.
errors.unsupportedBrowser: Your browser does not support OffscreenCanvas. Please use the latest version of Chrome, Edge, or Firefox.
